大发精准回本稳定计划群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239061405_63542902<br>vk.com/topic-239046727_65071335<br>vk.com/topic-238863722_64237754<br>vk.com/topic-239004259_64403288<br>vk.com/topic-239004131_65285399<br>vk.com/topic-239048401_65285396<br>vk.com/topic-239058767_65071341<br>vk.com/topic-239017463_63825579<br>vk.com/topic-239048965_63542915<br>vk.com/topic-239027361_65285402<br>vk.com/topic-239017461_65285404<br>vk.com/topic-239034814_63625648<br>vk.com/topic-239041423_63825562<br>vk.com/topic-239004177_65071353<br>vk.com/topic-239061508_64135372<br>vk.com/topic-239014567_65071355<br>vk.com/topic-239051184_63625656<br>vk.com/topic-239015656_63967254<br>vk.com/topic-239049373_63825599<br>vk.com/topic-239046727_65071362<br>vk.com/topic-238863722_64237778<br>vk.com/topic-238973083_63825609<br>vk.com/topic-239004131_65285423<br>vk.com/topic-238932595_63542929<br>vk.com/topic-239046657_65071366<br>vk.com/topic-239049096_63967265<br>vk.com/topic-239029558_64135383<br>vk.com/topic-239017461_65285432<br>vk.com/topic-239034814_63625672<br>vk.com/topic-239061375_63542935<br>vk.com/topic-239004177_65071373<br>vk.com/topic-239061272_64237791<br>vk.com/topic-239051184_63625681<br>vk.com/t
